title: Progressive Weapons and Tools
description: Replaces weapon and tool textures with different ones for each material.
body: This resource pack replaces the textures of both the weapons and tools of Minecraft with ones that better show game progression than just a simple recolor while maintaining the sprit of the default textures. This is best shown through the swords and how each material has a unique design. Hopefully, this will make your progression from common wood to ultra rare netherite even more exciting!
